name: cloud ADR: a dry-run previews without writing files
command:
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/cloud-adr.sh" --title t --pillar security --decision d --slug t --seq 1 --out-dir adr --dry-run --now 2026-06-08T12:00:00Z 2>&1 | grep -E 'dry_run=true' 1>&2
{ [ ! -e adr ] && echo no-files 1>&2; } || { echo FAIL 1>&2; exit 1; }
